description:
About the Role
This is a hybrid, project-based role that goes beyond a traditional single-focus AI position. You will have the opportunity to work with various AI tools and explore different use cases depending on project needs, including content generation, automation, and API integrations, etc.
Depending on project requirements, you may be exposed to different aspects of AI applications — from generating social media content and videos, to experimenting with AI tools, automation workflows, light programming integrations (e.g. APIs), and AI Model Development, etc.
This role is ideal for someone who is highly adaptable and open to exploring different areas of AI. This role requires a strong willingness to take on new challenges and experiment with various AI tools and applications across different domains.
***Detailed scope and responsibilities will be further shared during the interview.
岗位说明
此岗位为项目制、跨领域的AI职位，不局限于单一方向。根据不同项目需求，工作内容将涵盖内容创作、创意制作以及基础技术应用等多个层面。
您将有机会接触不同AI应用场景，包括内容生成、自动化流程以及API整合等。
此岗位适合喜欢挑战、具备高度的适应能力，愿意探索不同的AI领域，并积极尝试将各类AI工具与应用运用在不同场景中。
更具体的工作内容将在面试过程中进一步说明。
What you'll be doing
Apply and integrate generative AI tools and APIs to build practical solutions.
Perform basic scripting or automation (e.g. using Python, API integrations) to improve workflow efficiency.
Design and prototype AI-driven solutions based on business or client needs.
Stay up-to-date with the latest trends and advancements in the field of generative AI.
Develop creative concepts and translate them into AI-generated outputs.
Write effective prompts and optimize AI-generated results.
Performs any other related duties as assigned.
What we're looking for
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related technical field.
Basic knowledge of programming (e.g. Python, API usage such as OpenAI)
Strong interest in exploring AI applications across different domains.
Hands-on experience with modern AI tools.
Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
Passion for staying informed about the latest advancements in the AI.
Familiar (or willing to learn) with AI tools for content generation (video, image, text).
Ability to learn quickly, experiment with AI workflows and automation.
Portfolio showcasing AI-generated content is required.
Required Language:
Mandarin
, English. We are seeking candidates proficient in Mandarin to effectively communicate with Mandarin-speaking clients.
Good to Have (Bonus)
Experience integrating AI tools into workflows (e.g. automation, prompt pipelines).
Experience in developing and deploying generative AI models.
Proficiency in programming languages like Python, Java, or C++etc.
***
Candidates with other AI-related experience or relevant past roles (e.g. AI Product Manager or similar) will also be considered. We welcome applicants from diverse AI backgrounds.***
***欢迎拥有其他AI相关经验或相关工作经历（例如 AI product manager或类似职位）的候选人。我们欢迎来自不同AI背景的申请者。***
Benefits:
Annual Leave, Medical Leave, Hospitalization Leave, Maternity Leave, Paternity Leave & Compassionate Leave, etc.
Transport Allowance, Medical Claim, Performance Bonus, Annual Increment, etc.
EPF, SOCSO, EIS Coverage.
Accessibility - Office near MRT Pusat Bandar Damansara Station.
Company Activities - Company Lunch & Dinner, Employee Birthday Celebration, Team Building Activities, Company Trip etc.
Well-stocked office pantry keeps employees satisfied and energized throughout the day. Various snacks, coffee, etc.
Comfortable Working Environment. Work Life Balance ~
福利 & 其他：
年假、病假、产假、陪产假等等。
交通津贴、医药福利、年终绩效奖金、年度调薪等等。
公积金、社险、就业保险。
地点方便，靠近地铁站。
公司聚餐活动、员工生日福利、节日福利、团建、公司旅游。
Pantry茶水间：各种零嘴、飲品、咖啡机等让员工们随时都能补充能量。
舒适友好的工作环境，提倡工作与生活的平衡。
